calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Petition For 1. Clarification And Construction Of Will; And 2. To Determine Persons Entitled To Distribution

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing. The Personal Representative Shall File Either A Petition For Order For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report Of Status Of Administration Pursuant To Prob. Code Sec.12200 Et Seq. Two Weeks Before The Hearing Date.
Off Calendar Jun-01-2026 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Nov-17-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Avid Alavi for petitioner and administrator Minna Fernan (via Zoom).
Thomas Aiken for legal heirs Robert Metcalf, John Metcalf, and Diane Millett (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed.

The Court noted that at the last calling of the case, Jennifer Duffy had appeared and stated an oral objection, and the Court had provided her with a deadline to file a written objection. No written objection was filed.

Mr. Aiken confirmed he was not raising any objection.

The Court overruled the prior oral objection made by Jennifer Duffy. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The will dated August 31, 1989 is admitted to probate. Minna Fernan is appointed Administrator with Will Annexed, with full IAEA authority. Bond is set in the amount of $3,077,000. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for June 7, 2027, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee. The Court disclosed that the assigned probate referee is married to a legal advisory staff member of this court.

Order signed in open court. The previously scheduled status hearing of June 1, 2026 was taken off calendar.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Aug-11-2025 Continued To Nov-17-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Jennifer Duffy appeared via zoom (pro per) (objector).
Avid Alavi appeared via zoom for Minna Fernan (petitioner).

Ms. Duffy objected to the admission of the will, that other heirs on this matter may been influenced by Ms. Alavi, that she doesn't believe that the holographic will is her aunties handwriting, and that she believes it was not her aunties intention to give all her monies to the charities.

Ms. Alavi stated that she her client found the holographic will, that she emailed it to everyone, but nobody replied, and that her client remains neutral in this matter.

The Court ordered Ms. Duffy to file her objections in writing on or before October 22, 2025 and if no filings received by October 22, 2025 the Court will waive the objection.
The matter is continued to November 17, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Jul-21-2025 Continued To Aug-11-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-28-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Apr-28-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Thomas Wrobel appeared by zoom for Beth Anne Metcalf-Tierney (petitioner).
Avid Alavi appeared via zoom for and with Minna Fernan and Dinae Milllett (petitioner/proposed administrator).
Jennifer Duffy appeared via zoom (pro per).
Robert Metcalf appeared via zoom (pro per).

Counsels presented oral arguments, that 6 out of 10 family members wanted a private professional fiduciary, that they are not very close family, and that Ms. Fernan has not spoken to any of the heirs. Petition for letters of administration filed by Beth Metcalf-Tierney is ordered off calendar. Petition for letters of administration filed by Minna Fernan is taken under submission.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
